ddls:
CREATE TABLE "educational_strategies" (
  "strat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each educational strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the educational strategy */,
  "goals" TEXT /* Goals of the educational strategy */,
  "methods" TEXT /* Methods used in the educational strategy */,
  "evaluation_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria for evaluating the educational strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "sch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "school_type" TEXT /* Type of school (e.g., public, private) */,
  "school_district" TEXT /* School district */,
  "school_city" TEXT /* School city */,
  "school_state" TEXT /* School state */,
  "school_zip" TEXT /* School zip code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_brackets" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income bracket */,
  "income_range" TEXT /* Income range description */,
  "min_income" INTEGER /* Minimum income for the bracket */,
  "max_income" INTEGER /* Maximum income for the bracket */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_survey_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey response */,
  "stu_id" INTEGER /* Student identifier */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Survey identifier */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Question identifier */,
  "response" TEXT /* Student response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "survey_name" TEXT /* Survey name */,
  "survey_description" TEXT /* Survey description */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Survey start date */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Survey end date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Survey identifier */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Question text */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Question type (e.g., multiple choice, open-ended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Researcher name */,
  "email" TEXT /* Researcher email */,
  "role" TEXT /* Researcher role (e.g., administrator, analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each educational strategy
Methods used in the educational strategy
Criteria for evaluating the educational strategy
Unique identifier for each income bracket
Unique identifier for each survey response
